overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a warrior character with a round shield walking through a sunlit forest path, transitioning through ancient stone ruins to a rocky mountain overlook with geothermal steam vents and snow-capped peaks in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit forest trail with distant campfire smoke

events.description: smoke plume from distant campfire becomes visible ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: warrior character walking steadily along forest path toward distant smoke

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the forest path
winding dirt path through the forest with scattered rocks
dense shrubs and ferns along the trail edges
thin column of smoke rising from campfire ahead on the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit forest trail with dense vegetation. The camera follows a warrior character from behind as they walk along a dirt path. Tall pine trees line both sides, and a thin column of smoke becomes visible in the distance, indicating a campfire ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest clearing with stone campfire and carved wooden totem

events.description: character passes stone campfire structure with active smoke on the right side
path enters denser forest section with large stone archway ruins visible ahead

agents.ego_description: character continues walking past the campfire area and carved totem toward stone archway ruins

entered.detail: circular stone fire pit with active smoke rising from it
tall wooden pole with carved faces and symbols
massive ancient stone archway visible through the trees ahead

segments.scene_description: The character passes a stone campfire with rising smoke and a carved wooden totem on the left. The path widens slightly as the character approaches a massive stone archway visible through the trees ahead, transitioning into a denser forest section.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone archway ruins with geothermal steam vents

events.description: character walks beneath massive stone archway into rocky terrain with steam vents
geothermal steam vents become visible on the right side of the rocky path

agents.ego_description: character walks under the stone archway and begins ascending the rocky mountain path

entered.detail: large weathered stone archway that the path passes underneath
yellow fabric banner hanging from wooden post near the archway
white steam rising from cracks in the rocky ground
large boulders and rocky outcrops replacing forest vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character passes beneath a massive stone archway into a more rugged area. The forest gives way to rocky terrain with geothermal steam vents visible on the right. A yellow banner marks the transition point as the path becomes more mountainous.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain overlook with steam vents and snow-capped peaks

events.description: path opens to reveal expansive snow-capped mountain range ahead
steam vents become more prominent on the right as character ascends rocky outcrop

agents.ego_description: character climbs up rocky outcrop toward the mountain vista with steam vents nearby

entered.detail: dramatic mountain peaks with snow visible in the distance against blue sky
steep rocky cliff with jagged edges rising on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the forest onto an open rocky overlook. The view opens to reveal a stunning vista of snow-capped mountains in the distance. Geothermal steam vents are prominent on the right as the character continues ascending the rocky terrain toward the peaks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a lush, sunlit forest trail that gradually opens into a rugged, high-altitude mountain overlook. It begins by following a warrior from behind along a dirt path lined with tall pine trees, moving toward a distant column of smoke. As the character passes a stone campfire and a carved wooden totem, the path widens and leads through a dense thicket toward a massive stone archway. The scene then shifts as the character passes beneath the arch and a yellow banner, where the forest gives way to rocky terrain punctuated by geothermal steam vents. Finally, the camera emerges from the trees onto an open rocky plateau, revealing a vast vista of snow-capped mountains in the distance as the character continues their ascent.
